paper.title: Evolution strategies as a scalable alternative to reinforcement learning
paper.abstract: We’ve discovered that evolution strategies (ES), an optimization technique that’s been known for decades, rivals the performance of standard reinforcement learning (RL) techniques on modern RL benchmarks (e.g. Atari/MuJoCo), while overcoming many of RL’s inconveniences.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
